pr.title: Match itoctarockstone and cleanup it_27CF to match it, rename to ityoshiegglay, rename it_2F2B to ityoshitongue
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: PR 2220 matched `itoctarockstone`, renamed item translation units from address-style names to Yoshi-specific names, deleted the broad `it_27CF` header/dox surface, added narrower item headers, updated configure matching status, adjusted item/fighter includes, and changed several `.sdata2` symbols from global address names to local labels. The only review-like feedback in the slice is the decomp-dev bot report, which shows 2 new matches for `itoctarockstone` but also reports broken matches under the old renamed units.

key_files.role: Object status/path update: `itoctarockstone.c` changed NonMatching to Matching; `it_2F2B.c` path renamed to `ityoshitongue.c`; `it_27CF.c` path renamed to `ityoshiegglay.c` and changed NonMatching to Matching.
Primary matched item source; 45 added and 2 deleted lines across 3 hunks.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists `main/melee/it/items/itoctarockstone` `it_802E89D0` and `.sdata2` as new matches

what_changed: `itoctarockstone.c` was promoted from NonMatching to Matching in `configure.py`, and the bot report lists new matches for `main/melee/it/items/itoctarockstone` function `it_802E89D0` and its `.sdata2`.
The configure item list renamed `melee/it/items/it_2F2B.c` to `melee/it/items/ityoshitongue.c` while keeping it Matching.
The configure item list renamed/replaced `melee/it/items/it_27CF.c` with `melee/it/items/ityoshiegglay.c` and marked the new path Matching.
The broad `src/melee/it/items/it_27CF.h` and `src/melee/it/items/it_27CF.dox` files were deleted.

Several fighter sources stopped including `it/items/it_27CF.h`; some now include item-specific headers such as `itfoxblaster.h`, `itgamewatchmanhole.h`, `itgamewatchparachute.h`, or `itgamewatchjudge.h`.
New or expanded item headers were added for `ityoshiegglay.h`, `itfoxblaster.h`, `itgamewatchmanhole.h`, and `itgamewatchparachute.h`.
Several `.sdata2` entries in `config/GALE01/symbols.txt` were changed from global `it_804...` symbol names to local `@...` labels.
The diff includes broad include pruning in Kirby special files and small style-only formatting changes such as cast spacing, line wrapping, and an empty function compacted to one line.

smart_moves.text: When deleting a broad item header, the PR replaced callsite includes with narrower item-specific headers where the diff shows a concrete dependency, e.g. Fox blaster and Game & Watch manhole/parachute/judge.
The PR updated `configure.py` paths/statuses alongside source renames, avoiding a stale build object path for renamed item translation units.
The PR paired symbol metadata changes with the item matching work, converting selected `.sdata2` symbols to local labels rather than leaving address-style globals in `symbols.txt`.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For item cleanup, replace a catch-all generated/address-style header with specific item headers at each callsite when the dependencies can be named from local context.
When renaming an item translation unit, update build configuration paths in the same PR so the matching/nonmatching ledger follows the new source filename.

A bot report can show old-unit broken matches after a rename; intake should record that as rename/report evidence rather than assuming a true code regression or a clean match without further evidence.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists 2 new `itoctarockstone` matches and 21 broken matches under old `it_27CF` and `it_2F2B` units
diff_excerpt: configure.py renamed the old unit paths

naming_conventions.name: ityoshiegglay
naming_conventions.meaning: Semantic replacement for old address-style `it_27CF` item path, as stated by the PR title and configure diff.

naming_conventions.name: ityoshitongue
naming_conventions.meaning: Semantic replacement for old address-style `it_2F2B` item path, as stated by the PR title and configure diff.

naming_conventions.name: itfoxblaster / itgamewatchmanhole / itgamewatchparachute / itgamewatchjudge
naming_conventions.meaning: Specific item headers used instead of the broad `it_27CF.h` include at fighter callsites.
Local-label replacements for selected global address-style `.sdata2` symbols in `symbols.txt`; the PR evidence supports the metadata change but not a broader naming rule.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Promote a source object to Matching only after updating the build object entry; here `itoctarockstone.c` was changed to Matching in `configure.py` and the bot report recorded two new matches for that unit.
Use symbol scope/name metadata for local constants when matching a unit's `.sdata2`; the PR changed several `.sdata2` float/double symbols from global address names to local `@...` labels.
Header surface cleanup can remove many stale includes without changing function logic, but it should be paired with exact replacement headers where needed.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: broad include removals in Kirby files
diff_excerpt: item-specific include replacements in Fox/GameWatch files

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Existing fake-match code should be treated narrowly. This PR preserves a comment in `ftKb_SpecialAirHi3_Phys` stating `FAKE MATCH: comma operator required for regalloc`, but the slice does not show new verification for that tactic.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report for GALE01 showed matched code 55.09% (-0.03%, -1264 bytes), linked code 31.47% (+0.02%, +676 bytes), matched data 34.55% (-0.00%, -48 bytes), linked data 28.94% (+0.00%, +32 bytes), 2 new matches for `itoctarockstone`, 21 broken matches under old `it_27CF`/`it_2F2B` units, and 1 unmatched-item regression for `it_27CF` `.sdata2`.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs mentioning `ityoshiegglay` or `it_27CF` to see whether bot-reported broken matches were accepted rename noise or later corrected.
Search for remaining includes of `it/items/it_27CF.h` after PR 2220 to verify the broad header was fully retired.

Search `symbols.txt` history for `it_804DD838`, `it_804DD83C`, `it_804DD840`, `it_804DD848`, `it_804DDA18`, `it_804DDA1C`, `it_804DDA20`, and `it_804DDA28` to understand why these `.sdata2` symbols became local labels.
Search for later comments or PRs about `itoctarockstone` `.sdata2` matching and `it_802E89D0`.
Search for `FAKE MATCH: comma operator required for regalloc` to determine whether that Kirby fake-match tactic was later cleaned up.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, state, author, changed file counts
diff_excerpt/raw_diff: representative hunks for symbols, configure, includes, and formatting
notes: The PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the loaded slice, so intent beyond the title and diff is limited.

The raw diff excerpt is truncated, so detailed per-function changes inside `itoctarockstone.c`, `ityoshiegglay.c`, `ityoshitongue.c`, `it_26B1.c`, and `it_2725.c` are not fully visible from loaded evidence.

The bot report shows new `itoctarockstone` matches but also broken matches under old renamed units; the slice does not include a reviewer explanation confirming these as acceptable rename/report artifacts.
Merge status is available from metadata, but no manual approval/review rationale is present.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Replace broad item headers with item-specific headers during cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2220 deleted `it_27CF.h` and updated callsites to include narrower headers such as `itfoxblaster.h`, `itgamewatchmanhole.h`, `itgamewatchparachute.h`, and `itgamewatchjudge.h` where the diff showed concrete item dependencies.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Rename source objects and configure entries together
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2220 renamed item paths in `configure.py` from `it_2F2B.c` to `ityoshitongue.c` and from `it_27CF.c` to `ityoshiegglay.c`, while also updating matching status for the affected objects.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Treat bot broken-match reports carefully across renames
accepted_candidate_records.text: The decomp-dev bot reported 21 broken matches under old `it_27CF`/`it_2F2B` units while the diff renamed those units in `configure.py`; this is evidence to investigate rename/report accounting rather than standalone proof of a functional regression.

source_update_candidates.title: Item path rename: it_27CF to ityoshiegglay
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2220 changed `configure.py` from `Object(NonMatching, "melee/it/items/it_27CF.c")` to `Object(Matching, "melee/it/items/ityoshiegglay.c")`, deleted `src/melee/it/items/it_27CF.h` and `it_27CF.dox`, and added `src/melee/it/items/ityoshiegglay.h`.
source_update_candidates.reason: May be useful as a historical path fact for later searches that reference old `it_27CF` names.

source_update_candidates.title: Item path rename: it_2F2B to ityoshitongue
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2220 changed `configure.py` from `Object(Matching, "melee/it/items/it_2F2B.c")` to `Object(Matching, "melee/it/items/ityoshitongue.c")` and changed `src/melee/it/items/ityoshitongue.c`.
source_update_candidates.reason: May be useful as a historical path fact for later searches that reference old `it_2F2B` names.

source_update_candidates.title: itoctarockstone matched in configure
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2220 changed `melee/it/items/itoctarockstone.c` from NonMatching to Matching in `configure.py`; the bot report lists new matches for `it_802E89D0` and `.sdata2` in `main/melee/it/items/itoctarockstone`.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path/status history; curator should verify whether source corpora track historical matching status.

source_update_candidates.title: Yoshi item semantic names from PR 2220
source_update_candidates.text: PR title and configure diff support associating old item filenames `it_27CF` with `ityoshiegglay` and `it_2F2B` with `ityoshitongue`.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could improve historical item-name mapping if the data sheet maintains item filename aliases.

source_update_candidates.title: Header cleanup with narrow replacement includes
source_update_candidates.text: Possible standard candidate: when removing a broad generated header, replace includes with the smallest item-specific owning header that actually provides the used declarations, and update callsites in the same PR.
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR provides a concrete example, but curator should decide whether this is already covered by truthful-headers-and-includes or needs a separate standard.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the bot's broken-match rows as confirmed regressions; the evidence also shows path renames that may explain old-unit report churn.
Do not infer detailed matching tactics for `itoctarockstone.c` internals; the loaded diff is truncated before enough function-body detail is available.
Do not generalize that all address-style item names should be renamed semantically; this PR supports only the specific `it_27CF`/`it_2F2B` renames named in the title and configure diff.
Do not treat the preserved Kirby `FAKE MATCH` comma operator as newly justified by this PR; no new objdiff rationale is included in the slice.
